title: Danny Sculthorpe
extract: Daniel Sculthorpe (born 8 September 1979), also known by the nickname "Scully", is an English former professional rugby league footballer. He last played as a prop for the Widnes Vikings. He also played for the Rochdale Hornets, Wigan Warriors, Castleford Tigers, Wakefield Trinity Wildcats, and the Huddersfield Giants.
